quiz_items.question: What is a variance for laser light shows?
options: A discount on FDA filing fees
Formal permission to deviate from Class IIIa demonstration limits for laser shows
An exemption from all safety requirements
A type of laser projector certification
quiz_items.explanation: A variance is formal permission to deviate from a requirement of the regulations - specifically to use laser radiation levels exceeding Class IIIa limits for demonstration laser products.

quiz_items.question: A variance for laser light shows can be transferred from one manufacturer to another.
quiz_items.explanation: False. A variance is a special performance standard limited to specific products by the variance holder. It is not transferrable between manufacturers.
